records.ety: [L. libatio, fr. libare to take a little from anything, to taste, to pour out as an offering: cf. F. libation.]

defs: The act of pouring a liquid or liquor, usually wine, either on the ground or on a victim in sacrifice, in honor of some deity; also, the wine or liquid thus poured out.
quotes: A heathen sacrifice or libation to the earth.
